name: Avivid Water Technology, LLC
description: Avivid Water Technology LLC manufactures a patented water purification reactor known as “TurboCoag®” that removes solids, heavy metals, arsenic, bacteria and other contaminants from industrial wastewater. Each TurboCoag® reactor treats 50 to 200 gallons per minute and eliminates up to 99.9% of contaminants in a single process step. For scalability several reactors can be chained together to treat more water. TurboCoag® uses electrochemistry to cost effectively compete with and replace chemical water treatment. TurboCoag® is low maintenance, offers continuous operation, has a small footprint, and effectively treats landfill leachate, produced oil, acid mine drainage, and many other wastewaters. TurboCoag® reduces customer OPEX for sludge disposal by 30-70%, chemical use by 70-95%, and biocide use by 100%. TurboCoag's patented design completely eliminates the issues of passivation and sludge buildup that affect legacy electrocoagulation designs while using less energy.

name: Zila Bioworks, Spc
description: At ZILA BioWorks, we take plants and convert them into industrial bioplastics, specifically bio-epoxy resins. The technology is an innovative bio-epoxy resin based on the fatty acids (FA) of hempseed oil for use in composites, coatings, and adhesives. Unlike the conventional approach of creating epoxy resins that builds the monomers on the structure of triglyceride of oil, the ZILA Works’ approach is to dismantle (by hydrolysis) the triglyceride structure of hemp oil and rebuild new monomers with structures more appropriate for thermosets. We have identified clear steps to a 60% reduction in carbon footprint compared to petroleum-based epoxies. ZILA is more than a bio-epoxy manufacturer; we are a custom formulator, providing the highest value-added step in the epoxy supply chain so we can sell our bio-resin system to product manufacturers as a drop-in solution.
